metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1363
metadata.comment:
Rationale: In figure 2 the authors use antibodies to demonstrate that Eps15 is enriched in the neuromuscular junction by both confocal and EM.

As noted by Pim, the authors point out:
1. "..Collectively, we conclude that Eps15 is widely expressed but is enriched in the neuropil and in the presynaptic compartment of the NMJ."
2. "...reveals that Eps15 is associated with vesicles in the lumen of boutons..."
3. "...Interestingly, a subset of Eps15 is localized to the rim of invaginating vesicles or pits at the plasma membrane in stimulated shibirets1 mutant boutons.... Experimental description: from the abstract, "We generated Drosophila eps15-null mutants..."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
